utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present but lacks detailed costs (e.g., deductibles, copays) and mental health specifics; however it does include a monthly premium, so costs are partially covered. property_coverage is null (missing). travel_coverage includes destinations and a feature but lacks costs. additional_services lists services but no costs. total_budget includes monthly and annual costs. Fully specified items require inclusion with costs; only total_budget is fully specified with a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, 1 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists one specific plan name: EliteCare Premium Family Plan under health_coverage. In the ground-truth ratings, the closest matching item is EliteCare Premium Plan within primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mental_health. The final plan does not specify property or travel plan names from the catalog, only destinations and features, so only the explicit named plan can be mapped.
